scripts.test:hosted: corepack pnpm --dir apps/web exec playwright test
scripts.test:coverage: cross-env HOSTED_COVERAGE=1 corepack pnpm --dir apps/web exec playwright test
scripts.test:automation: corepack pnpm --dir apps/web exec playwright test --config ../../automationTestcase/playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:automation:coverage: cross-env HOSTED_COVERAGE=1 corepack pnpm --dir apps/web exec playwright test --config ../../automationTestcase/playwright.config.ts
